data.title: StackStride 2026
data.description:
24-Hour Hackathon

StackStride is a 24-hour hackathon where teams of 2-4 build innovative solutions to real-world problems. This year's theme focuses on AI & Sustainability.
data.shortDescription: 24-hour hackathon — build innovative solutions to real-world problems. Theme: AI & Sustainability.

data.title: Code-O-Fiesta 2026
data.description:
The Ultimate Coding Championship

Code-O-Fiesta is ITSA's flagship annual coding competition that brings together the brightest minds from across engineering colleges. Compete in multiple rounds of algorithmic challenges, debug-a-thons, and speed coding.

What to Expect

  • 3 intense rounds of competitive programming
  • Industry-standard problem sets
  • Prizes worth ₹50,000+
  • Networking with industry professionals
  • Certificate for all participants
data.shortDescription: ITSA's flagship annual coding competition — compete in algorithmic challenges and win prizes worth ₹50,000+

data.title: Alumni Nexus 2026
data.description:
Connect with ITSA Alumni

A networking event bridging current students with successful alumni working at top tech companies. Hear their journeys, get career guidance, and build lasting connections.
data.shortDescription: Networking event bridging current students with successful alumni at top tech companies.

data.title: Web Dev Bootcamp 2025
data.description:
Full-Stack Development Workshop

An intensive 3-day workshop covering React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL. Build a production-ready app from scratch.
data.shortDescription: 3-day intensive workshop on full-stack development with React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL.
